title: [InstCombine] Reducing multiplications means we can have nsw and nuw tags
test_patch:
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/div.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/div.ll
index e8a25ff44d029..662d91b97a58d 100644
--- a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/div.ll
+++ b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/div.ll
@@ -380,7 +380,7 @@ define i32 @test26(i32 %a) {
 
 define i32 @test27(i32 %a) {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @test27(
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[DIV:%.*]] = shl nuw i32 [[A:%.*]], 1
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[DIV:%.*]] = shl nuw nsw i32 [[A:%.*]], 1
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[DIV]]
 ;
   %shl = shl nuw i32 %a, 2

tests.test_body:
define i32 @test26(i32 %a) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @test26(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[DIV:%.*]] = shl nsw i32 [[A:%.*]], 2
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[DIV]]
  %mul = mul nsw i32 %a, 12
  %div = sdiv i32 %mul, 3
  ret i32 %div
}

define i32 @test27(i32 %a) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @test27(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[DIV:%.*]] = shl nuw nsw i32 [[A:%.*]], 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[DIV]]
  %shl = shl nuw i32 %a, 2
  %div = udiv i32 %shl, 2
  ret i32 %div
}
